text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan's movements seem a little off during
training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine, really! Look at these rippling muscles,
just full of energ—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Hold on a minute... My biceps aren't as taut
as usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My hammies and triceps aren't their usual,
powerful selves either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. Her muscles aren't in top condition
right now. Maybe she's overworking herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be best for us to revise her race
schedule...
